name: Chili Relleno (Tofu) Casserole
recipeInstructions:
1. Split the whole chilis lengthwise and remove seeds.
2. Lay them flat in the bottom of a 13x9 baking dish.
3. Place tofu on paper towel and gently squeeze out excess moisture.
4. Crumble and blend half the tofu with jack cheese.
5. Blend remaining half with sharp cheese.
6. Pot chilis with a layer of Jack-mix followed by a layer of Sharp-mix.
7. Add a layer of diced green chilis.
8. Repeat layers until all cheese and chilis are used.
9. Beat eggs with milk.
10. Pour over the casserole.
11. Spread top of casserole with salsa.
12. Bake at 350°F oven for 45 minutes.
